chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 649 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 2970/25 3.For hearing of main case 27-05-2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for petitioner does not press prayer clause (A) and only while maintaining prayer clause (B) of the petition submits that the respondents/competent authority may be directed to decide the Representation / Appeal of the petitioner (available at page-27 of the petition), if pending within shortest possible time. Since the petitioner has already availed his alternate remedy by filing Representation / Appeal which is pending with the respondents and learned AAG available in Court in other matters while waiving notice of this petition submits that directions may be issued to Chairman, SPSC / competent authority to decide his representation / appeal, if pending, within 15 days, after receipt of this order. After such, counsel for the petitioner does not press instant petition, which is disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
